summary: FORENSIC QUALITY TEST - ALL MODULES BLOCKED BY API KEY ERRORS. Production URL: https://biqc.ai. Authentication with Andre works. Soundboard shows OPENAI_API_KEY rejected errors for all queries. War Room shows 'product_or_service is required' validation errors. Board Room inaccessible due to session loss on navigation. 60-consecutive target NOT MET for any module.

authentication_result.notes: Login works via /login-supabase. Redirects to /advisor correctly.

soundboard.primary_error: OpenAI rejected the configured API key. Please verify OPENAI_API_KEY in the backend environment.

war_room.notes: Every query returns validation error - missing required field product_or_service

board_room.notes: Navigation to /boardroom redirects to public homepage, losing session. Board Room route may not be accessible from production or has routing issues.

risks_requiring_attention: Response Delay for Zanda Health - 70.5 hours
Follow-up Needed for Business Subscription Plan - $1750

critical.error: OpenAI rejected the configured API key. Please verify OPENAI_API_KEY in the backend environment.

critical.issue: Route inaccessible - session loss on navigation

integration_issues.issue: Session lost when navigating to /boardroom route

quality_criteria_applied.relevance: Response must address the question's business domain
quality_criteria_applied.no_hallucination: No generic filler, no API error messages, no contradictions

action_items: CRITICAL: Verify and fix OPENAI_API_KEY in production backend environment - key is being rejected
CRITICAL: Fix War Room API validation - /war-room/respond requires product_or_service field but frontend is not sending it
HIGH: Fix Board Room routing - /boardroom navigation causes session loss
After fixes: Re-run 60-turn forensic test to validate consecutive pass target
critical_code_review_comments: War Room endpoint expects 'product_or_service' field but frontend WarRoomConsole.js only sends 'question' in the POST body
Board Room route may be protected differently than other routes causing redirect to homepage
API key validation should have more graceful fallback handling

success_rate.frontend: 50% (login and advisor page working, but module navigation broken)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Authentication works via /login-supabase. All three advisory modules (Soundboard, War Room, Board Room) are non-functional in production due to API key rejection and validation errors. The 60-turn forensic benchmark cannot be achieved until backend API issues are resolved. OPENAI_API_KEY appears invalid in production. War Room requires product_or_service field that frontend doesn't send.

soundboard_rca.root_cause: Production OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable is invalid or expired
reproduction_steps: 3. Send any question in the Soundboard panel
4. Observe error: 'OpenAI rejected the configured API key'
soundboard_rca.mitigation: Verify and update OPENAI_API_KEY in production backend environment

war_room_rca.root_cause: API endpoint /war-room/respond requires 'product_or_service' field but WarRoomConsole.js only sends 'question'
war_room_rca.mitigation: Update WarRoomConsole.js to include product_or_service in POST body, or update backend to make field optional

board_room_rca.root_cause: Navigation to /boardroom route causes session invalidation
reproduction_steps: 3. Page redirects to homepage, session lost
board_room_rca.mitigation: Check route protection and session handling for /boardroom path
